raw_source_reread_reason: Parent batch already preserved the runner-only strip shell, the six declared deferred outputs, the repo-top omission seam, the v1/v2 contract delta, and the shared evidence-pack overwrite hazard.
reasons_for_candidate_status: The harden strip is the correct bounded runner-only residual shell after paired-family completion.
The runner-only vs result-only split remains reusable when preserved as an operational boundary rather than a semantic divorce.
The batch preserves zero repo-top visibility without losing the scripts' explicit local output contracts.
The v1/v2 control and storage delta remains reusable only if it stays separate from rename-style smoothing.
reasons_for_quarantine: Runner-only classification is not treated as absence of declared output coupling.
Repo-top omission is not treated as evidence that the harden strip is inactive or trivial.
V1 and v2 are not treated as interchangeable or cosmetically renamed scripts.
The shared sim_evidence_pack.txt sink is not treated as harmless.
The result-only orphan triplets remain outside this runner-only batch.
